---
title: "Lista 3 - RMarkdown - Díficil"
author: "Victor Bessa"
date: "2026-03-25"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## (a) Fórmula da média aritmética

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i
$$

## (b) Cálculo da média do PIB per capita

```{r}
pib <- readRDS("pib_cid.RDS")

media_pib <- mean(pib$pib_per_capita, na.rm = TRUE)

media_pib

```
